name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidered Shopping Bag Gold Lotus Medium 36cm ✨
name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidered Shopping Bag Gold Lotus Medium 36cm ✨
This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. The white style is fully embellished with a multicolor Butterfly Around The World pattern embroidery, highlighting the classic butterfly beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles, and can hold various daily items. The medium size features a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder. 8001
Size: 36 x 27.5 x 16.5cm,📸 Exclusive real-life photos 🎞
